test.name: TC_E2E_001

kw.name: Launch URL and Login in to the application
Open Browser and Launch URL
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/runner/work/Robot-Framework/Robot-Framework/results/pabot_results/0/browser/traces/temp/d3a52e05-2c4e-471e-80d3-224a193a934c"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://staging.convr.io/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the specified URL. Arguments: - url (optional): The URL to open. Defaults to https://staging.convr.io/. - browser (optional): The browser to use. Defaults to chromium. - headless (optional): Whether to run in headless mode. Defaults to True. Example: Open Browser and Launch URL url=https://example.com browser=firefox headless=False

kw.name: Handle Future Dialogs
kw.doc: Handle next dialog on page with ``action``.

kw.name: Login With Username And Password
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=realmInput at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Email field not available on Login page. Stopping entire suite execution.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'prabhakaran.sundaram-gdt+msig@convr.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Failed to type email in Email field on login page. Stopping entire suite execution.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Next button not clickable on login page. Stopping entire suite execution.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=username at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Login username field not visible. Stopping entire suite execution.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'prabhakaran.sundaram-gdt+msig@convr.com' in the given field.

Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Failed to type username in LoginUser field. Stopping entire suite execution.

Wait For Elements State

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: LoginPassword field not available. Stopping entire suite execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Cubes123$' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Failed to type password in LoginPassword field. Stopping entire suite execution.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Login button not clickable. Stopping entire suite execution.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.
Performs login using username and password. Any failure will stop entire suite execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Verify My Assignments Tab is displayed as a default tab
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//button[normalize-space()='Assigned to me'] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Verify My Assignments Tab: 'My Assignments' tab is not visible on the page.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.arg: msg=Verify My Assignments Tab: 'My Assignments' tab is not visible on the page.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Element States
kw.doc: Get the active states from the element found by ``selector``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Verify My Assignments Tab: 'My Assignments' tab is not in the expected visible state.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.arg: msg=Verify My Assignments Tab: 'My Assignments' tab is not in the expected visible state.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.
Verifies that the 'My Assignments' tab is visible and selected by default when the page loads.

kw.arg: Verify My Assignments Tab is displayed as a default tab
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Close Context
kw.msg: Switching context to CURRENT in CURRENT
kw.doc: Closes a Context.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.doc: End to End Testing for New Submission - In Draft Stage: This stage is primarily for Submission Clearance process
